---
title: "Kathleen O’Meara"
---

## Kathleen O’Meara

**Dates:** (1839-1888)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1871-3)

### Biography

A Roman Catholic journalist and novelist of Irish birth, she lived in France;  CMY thought her work sloppy.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 10th 1893
- Letter from July 21st [1883]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
